title: Support - App, user not logged ever, no data
scenario: Guest onboarding shows None for Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID, and Unknown for Last Connected in Support section
steps: Proceed through onboarding as a Guest (do not log in)
Tap on Account or Support section
Observe the displayed information fields: App version, App ID, Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected
expected: For a Guest user (not logged in), Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID should be hidden, show 'N/A', or display a message indicating the user is not logged in. Last Connected should show 'N/A' or a similar appropriate placeholder.
